governing_law.value: Substantive law of the Commonwealth of Pennsylvania
governing_law.exact_text: the arbitrator will be obligated to apply and follow the substantive law of the Commonwealth of Pennsylvania.

non_compete.value: Neoforma shall not place any advertisements on a Neoforma Site for any VerticalNet Competitor.
non_compete.exact_text: 7.1.4 During the Term, Neoforma shall not place any advertisements on a Neoforma Site for any VerticalNet Competitor.

fields.payment_terms: within 30 days after the end of each calendar quarter during the Term
fields.notice_period: at least 30 days prior to the end of the Initial Term or then current Renewal Term
